Home›Services›Managed Detection› Monitoring
Managed Services

24/7 Security
Monitoring

Effective security monitoring requires more than technology — it requires experienced analysts who understand the difference between genuine threats and routine noise. Our practice provides continuous, human-led monitoring that protects your environment around the clock.

Vigilance Without Compromise

Threat actors operate across all time zones and do not limit their activity to business hours. Organizations that lack 24/7 monitoring coverage accept significant risk during evenings, weekends, and holidays — precisely when attackers are most likely to act undiscovered.

Our security monitoring service provides continuous oversight by experienced analysts who understand your environment, your industry, and the threats specific to your business. When an alert triggers, it receives human evaluation — not an automated response template.

Capabilities

  • 24/7/365 security event monitoring and triage
  • Real-time alert analysis by experienced security analysts
  • Endpoint, network, and cloud environment coverage
  • Custom alert thresholds and escalation procedures
  • Monthly security posture reports and trend analysis
  • Direct escalation to incident response team when needed
  • Integration with your existing security tool stack
  • Regular detection tuning and coverage improvement
  • Quarterly business reviews and threat briefings

Who We Serve

Mid-market organizations that cannot staff a 24/7 SOC internally. Companies with compliance requirements mandating continuous monitoring. Organizations that have experienced gaps in after-hours threat detection. Businesses seeking experienced human analysts rather than purely automated monitoring.

Monitoring Coverage

  • Endpoint (EDR)
  • Network Traffic
  • Cloud Workloads
  • Email Security
  • Identity & Access
  • Application Logs

Start Monitoring
